programmes.show_description: An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Delightful festive romance starring Brooke Burns. Will missing packages and missed connections result in flight attendant Sydney finding love this Christmas? (2018)
Dan is a widower and single father who has no interest in dating. But will a chance meeting before Valentine's Day change his perspective on life and love? William Baldwin stars. (2012)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
